DOCUMENT.source-infobase-title: The Rules of the City of New York

RECORD.HEADING: Chapter 19: Penalty Schedule
RECORD.PARA: Chapter 19: Penalty Schedule

RECORD.HEADING: § 19-101 Definitions.
RECORD.PARA: § 19-101 Definitions.

Default penalty. "Default penalty" shall mean the penalty imposed by the Office of Administrative Trials and Hearings acting pursuant to Section 1049-a of the Charter in accordance with subparagraph (d) of paragraph one of subdivision d of Section 1049-a of the Charter. [ALP S-014]
RCNY. "RCNY" shall mean the Rules of the City of New York. [ALP S-067]
(Added City Record 5/5/2017, eff. 6/4/2017; amended City Record 10/15/2021, eff. 11/14/2021) [ALP S-067]

RECORD.HEADING: § 19-102 General.
RECORD.PARA: § 19-102 General.
(a)Unless otherwise indicated, all citations are to the New York City Administrative Code. [ALP S-014]
(b)Sections marked with an asterisk (*) indicate that a repeat violation is: [ALP S-014]
(1)a violation by the same respondent of the same section of law; and [ALP S-014]
(2)a violation that occurred within 12 months of the dates of 12 or more violations issued to the same respondent; and [ALP S-014]
(3)a violation that occurred at the same place of occurrence as the previous 12 violations. [ALP S-014]
(c)Sections marked with two asterisks (**) indicate that a second or third violation is: [ALP S-014]
(1)a violation by the same respondent of the same section of law as the previous violation(s); and [ALP S-014]
(2)a violation that occurred within 12 months of the date of the last violation issued to the same respondent. [ALP S-014]
(d)Sections marked with three asterisks (***) indicate that a second or third violation is: [ALP S-067]
(1)a violation by the same respondent of the same section of law as the previous violation(s); and [ALP S-067]
(2)a violation that occurred within 12 months of the date of the last violation issued to the same respondent; and [ALP S-067]
(3)the violation was issued to a natural person. [ALP S-067]
(e)Sections marked with five asterisks (*****) indicate that second or third violation is: [ALP S-067]
(1)a violation by the same respondent of the same section of law as the previous violation(s); and [ALP S-067]
(2)a violation that occurred within 18 months of the date of the last violation issued to the same respondent. [ALP S-067]
(f)A second or third violation for those violations found in 16 RCNY § 19-104, shall be: [ALP S-067]
(1)a violation by the same respondent of the same section of law as the previous violation(s); and [ALP S-067]
(2)a violation that occurred within three years of the date of the last violation issued to the same respondent. [ALP S-067]
(g)A second or third violation for those violations found in 16 RCNY § 19-106, shall be: [ALP S-067]
(1)a violation by the same respondent of any provisions of the rules found in 16 RCNY Chapter 8, or of § 16-117.1 of the New York City Administrative Code, and [ALP S-067]
(2)where the date of occurrence of the current violation is within two years of the date of the prior violation. [ALP S-067]

(h)For those violations found in 16 RCNY § 19-106, where a hearing officer finds that the respondent is a worker, defined as an individual employee working under the direction of another whose job duties permit no exercise of judgment or discretion), the penalty will be $500. [ALP S-067]
(Added City Record 5/5/2017, eff. 6/4/2017; amended City Record 10/15/2021, eff. 11/14/2021) [ALP S-067]

RECORD.HEADING: § 19-103 Sanitation Penalty Schedule.
RECORD.PARA: § 19-103 Sanitation Penalty Schedule.

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Failure to enter into agreement w/ CWZ awardee
Failure to Clean 18" Into Street (Vacant Lot)*
Preventing or otherwise interfering with work of DSNY employee
Failure to dispose of solid waste and recyclable materials properly (street events)

PARAFORMAT.CELLFORMAT: $100 per violation. Maximum: Up to $500 per day or $2,000 per street event.
$100 per violation. Maximum: Up to $500 per day or $2,000 per street event.

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Failure to provide sufficient number of refuse and recycling receptacles for street event

PARAFORMAT.CELLFORMAT: $100 per violation. Maximum: Up to $500 per day or $2,000 per street event.
$100 per violation. Maximum: Up to $500 per day or $2,000 per street event.

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Spillage condition from overflowing receptacle (Street events)

PARAFORMAT.CELLFORMAT: $100 per violation. Maximum: Up to $500 per day or $2,000 per street event.
$100 per violation. Maximum: Up to $500 per day or $2,000 per street event.

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Failure to properly bag and/or bundle refuse and recyclables

PARAFORMAT.CELLFORMAT: $100 per violation. Maximum: Up to $500 per day or $2,000 per street event.
$100 per violation. Maximum: Up to $500 per day or $2,000 per street event.

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Failure to place bagged and/or bundled refuse and recyclables at predetermined location

PARAFORMAT.CELLFORMAT: $100 per violation. Maximum: Up to $500 per day or $2,000 per street event.
$100 per violation. Maximum: Up to $500 per day or $2,000 per street event.

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Misc. Violation of vehicle body specifications
Illegal placement of stickers or decals on public or private property
Placement of unsolicited advertisements on private property in a manner contrary to sign authorized by General Business Law § 397-a.
Unlawful Placement of Handbills on Vehicles
Improper disposal of lead acid battery

RECORD.PARA: (Added City Record 5/5/2017, eff. 6/4/2017; amended City Record 10/15/2021, eff. 11/14/2021; amended City Record 10/9/2025, eff. 11/8/2025) [ALP S-115]

RECORD.HEADING: § 19-104 Sanitation Solid Waste Transfer Station and Intermodal Penalty Schedule.
RECORD.PARA: § 19-104 Sanitation Solid Waste Transfer Station and Intermodal Penalty Schedule.

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Operating a non-putrescible solid waste transfer station without a permit
Operating a putrescible waste transfer station without a permit.
Operating dump or fill material operation without a permit
Commissioner's rule (dump and fill material operation)
Violation of transfer station Rules re: siting / hours / reports / plans
Operating an intermodal solid waste container facility without a registration
Failure to handle intermodal containers in a safe and sanitary manner
Failure to maintain solid waste received at the facility for transports in intermodal containers
Failure of intermodal containers to meet the specification requirements set forth in 16 RCNY § 4-43
Failure to maintain and/or provide records
Failure to remove intermodal containers containing putrescible waste within 72 hours of receipt.
Failure to store equipment within the property lines.

RECORD.PARA: (Added City Record 10/15/2021, eff. 11/14/2021) [ALP S-067]

RECORD.HEADING: § 19-105 Sanitation Medical Waste Penalty Schedule.
RECORD.PARA: § 19-105 Sanitation Medical Waste Penalty Schedule.

PARA.CELLFORMAT: Improper disposal of regulated household waste
Failure to file DEC medical waste plans
Failure to file DEC medical waste plans/amended plans
Late filing of medical waste plans or reports within 30 days as per 16-120.1(i)(6)
Failure to file DEC Medical Waste Plans
Failure to File Medical Waste Plans / Amended Plans
Late Filing of Medical Waste Plans or Reports Within 30 days as per 16 RCNY § 11-02(c)
Improper disposal of regulated household waste

RECORD.PARA: (Added City Record 10/15/2021, eff. 11/14/2021) [ALP S-067]

RECORD.HEADING: § 19-106 Sanitation Asbestos Waste Penalty Schedule.
RECORD.PARA: § 19-106 Sanitation Asbestos Waste Penalty Schedule.

CELL.CELLFORMAT: Aggravating Circumstance: Visible Emission or Adult Exposure

CELLFORMAT.CHARFORMAT: PRESENT FOR STORAGE OF ASBESTOS WASTE:

RECORD.PARA: (Added City Record 10/15/2021, eff. 11/14/2021) [ALP S-067]
